pageContext.name: Heavenly King Cat
pageContext.description: Sideshow and Gantaku Anime are excited to present the Heavenly King Cat Statue from Eight Immortals and Nine Cats!  The background story comes from the Four Heavenly Kings in Chinese mythology and legend. Create the Four Heavenly kings with the image of a cat, Duo Wen. 'Duowen' means that he is quite proficient in Buddhism and hears about blessings and virtues in all directions. It can also be understood as being knowledgeable and loving to learn. Both worldly Dharma and Buddhism should have the spirit of the thirst for knowledge.  This statue stands 11.81' tall and comes with a door frame that stands 12.59' tall. Don't miss your chance to add this statue to your collection!
